programmes.show_description: Captured On Camera. A 22-year-old nursing assistant vanishes. When police check the local CCTV footage, they discover that Carlesha Freeland-Gaither was abducted right on camera. S3, Ep1
Lethal Obsessions. Exploring the mind of the obsessive murderer, following the work of psychologists as they study the muddled workings of the criminal psyche. S3, Ep2
Lasting Impressions. No matter how clean a crime scene appears to be, the culprit often leaves something behind. Even a fingerprint or shoe tread can lead to a conviction. S3, Ep3
View To A Rampage. A couple, just engaged, is found brutally murdered in a car. A surveillance camera gives the investigation its first break - a killer bent on revenge. S1, Ep5
Silent Witness. A respected businessman vanishes after a meeting. At the same time, a young mother doesn't come back from her job search. Can CCTV cameras help to solve the mystery? S1, Ep6

Written in Blood. Find out how blood can be the most telling evidence of a murder, and is often the only thing investigators have to link a killer to his victim. S8, Ep15
Critical Evidence. A partially decomposed skeleton is found by the side of the road and police suspect foul play, but it's not an easy investigation. S8, Ep16
The Perfect Heist. The FBI is called after a vault door refuses to open as it has been blasted into from the ceiling and over $2 million in valuables is gone. S6, Ep7
A Bitter End. A series of bank robberies in Texas leave authorities baffled. When similar heists begin the next year in California, FBI agents link the crimes. S6, Ep12
Liz Speirs And Billy Dove. Judge Rinder examines the case of Liz Speirs, who was defrauded of nearly half a million pounds, and the fatal stabbing of 21-year-old Billy Dove. S1, Ep9
Evil Sister Act. When a man's body is dumped in a cemetery, the trail leads detectives to question two very different sisters. How are they linked to this mysterious murder? S3, Ep9

programmes.show_name: On the Case with Paula Zahn
programmes.show_description: Eyes In The Darkness. The baffling murder of a beautiful young woman leads police to zero in on two potential suspects - her new boyfriend and an obsessed stalker. S12, Ep10
Silent Screams. A Minnesota woman vanishes from a mall after a date with her estranged husband. A shocking discovery in a parking lot leads police to CCTV footage. S7, Ep14
Fred Talbot. When arrested for historic sexual offences, TV weatherman Fred Talbot tried to hide the truth in police interviews. His repeated response of 'no comment' speaks volumes. S3, Ep3
By God, That's Enough. In Texas, a talented young woman has dreams of becoming a lawyer. But, a whirlwind relationship with her boyfriend leads to a horrifyingly dark crime. S5, Ep10
Plus-One. In Michigan a mother is murdered by her jealous ex-boyfriend. Friends and family examine home video footage and question if there were any warning signs. S6, Ep2

programmes.show_name: Evil Lives Here: Shadows Of Death
programmes.show_description: The Lake House. In 1980, a college freshman never returns after a night out. Police followed her trail to a mysterious lake house but 40 years later they still have no answers. S1, Ep10
Baby For Sale And Chris Welsh. Judge Rinder examines the case of a couple who were scammed out of £10,000 by a fraudulent surrogate, and a multi-million-pound drug empire. S1, Ep10
At Michelle's Door. Michelle Thornton's disappearance on New Year's Eve sparks a gruesome investigation. With no witnesses, can detective uncover the terrifying truth? S4, Ep4
Inside Job. The FBI investigates workers robbing their banks across multiple states, one who has a bomb strapped to them, all claiming a similar bizarre story. S2, Ep3
Armed And Dangerous. A TV personality has a violent encounter with another motorist. A dramatic car chase has a fiery end, and weapons are used in angry road encounters. S1, Ep3
Destructive Driving. An axe-wielding man taunts a motorist. Protesters disrupt a highway, infuriating motorists, and two raging drivers have a roadside showdown. S1, Ep4
Last Look Of Summer. A young woman is found dead in a Texas landfill. Detectives turn to their only witnesses: video cameras that captured the murderer's attempt to cover his tracks. S3, Ep2
Dead Wrong. Hiding a body can be tricky - it's sometimes easier to obscure the circumstances of death, turning murder into suicide or blaming it on someone else. S3, Ep4
Deadly Dealings. Contract killings arose out of the need to establish the perfect alibi, hiring someone can deflect guilt. Forensic science is changing this. S3, Ep5
Must Find Mickey. 21-year-old Mickey Shunick is missing after a night out. Police are unable to find any trace of the Louisiana student until they spot her on surveillance video. S2, Ep1
Vanished From Campus. Student Christian Aguilar mysteriously vanishes from his university campus. Police are stumped until CCTV footage takes the case in a shocking new direction. S2, Ep2

Fatal Twist. A field becomes a graveyard in Ohio's capital when a woman's body is discovered, but solving the murder would be a challenge. S8, Ep17
Vanished. Murderers will often go to great lengths to keep their crimes concealed, but forensic evidence is often impossible to cover up. S8, Ep18
Dangerous Gamble. Two masked robbers armed with semi-automatic weapons robbed armoured car couriers of $350,000 in the MGM Grand Hotel and Casino in Las Vegas. S6, Ep13
Dangerous Takedown. In 1997 two burglars broke into a home and shot at a police officer. One year later clues to the location of the suspects are revealed. S6, Ep14
Baby For Sale And Chris Welsh. Judge Rinder examines the case of a couple who were scammed out of £10,000 by a fraudulent surrogate, and a multi-million-pound drug empire. S1, Ep10
Too Good To Be True. The future looks bright for Donna Andersen when James Montgomery enters her life. But she soon makes a discovery that turns her marriage into a living nightmare. S1, Ep4

programmes.show_name: On the Case with Paula Zahn
programmes.show_description: Shadowy Figures. The search for the man who murdered a single mother might lead police to the perpetrator of a second brutal crime with chilling similarities. S12, Ep11
Seeing Red. At the scene of a traffic accident a teen is dead at the wheel of her car. An autopsy reveals a sinister crime - will CCTV footage find her killer? S7, Ep15
Harold Shipman. Harold Shipman was a much-loved doctor. Millions watched the GP speaking on TV discussing the benefits of care, not knowing he'd already killed dozens of patients. S3, Ep4
Everyone's Favourite Uncle. In 2018, Steve Clayton died in unusual circumstances. His body was found at the bottom of the stairs and the autopsy showed signs of poisoning. S6, Ep7
Out Of His Shell. In December 2001, 20-year-old Dustin Wehde was brutally shot dead in his neighbour's house. What happened to cause this tragic event in Iowa? S6, Ep8

programmes.show_name: Evil Lives Here: Shadows Of Death
programmes.show_description: Do No Harm. In Dallas, Texas, surgical patients were falling victim to a monster with a medical degree. An investigation showed Dr. Christopher Duntsch was to blame. S1, Ep11
Helen McCourt. 22-year-old Helen McCourt went missing on a stormy night in 1988. Her mother Marie desperately fights to find her. S4, Ep1
Beth's Last Party. Days after Beth von Steinner goes missing, her frozen body is found behind her house. With no witnesses or suspects, only CCTV footage can reveal the truth. S4, Ep6

programmes.show_name: Killer Confessions: Case Files Of A Texas Ranger
programmes.show_description: A mother calls on Texas Ranger Jim Holland, desperate for his help to solve the cold case murder of her son Joseph, executed in the East Texas woods. S1, Ep4
Protecting Holly. A plot to kidnap TV presenter Holly Willoughby is discovered when an undercover cop in the US spots something suspicious in an online chat room. S1, Ep2
